systemInstructions: Generate a Canvas 2D app using the browser Canvas 2D API and requestAnimationFrame.
Do not use React, CDNs, remote assets, npm packages, or plugin execution.
fileSystemRules: Write only inside generated/canvas for this runtime.
Split update, render, input, and state across the declared engine and game files.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: Include pause and restart behavior where reasonable.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
